description: Verify that when both onFailure and everyNRuns threshold fire on the same run, the auditor is invoked exactly once.

execute.cmd: node -e "const fs=require('fs'),p=require('path'); const cfg=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(p.join(process.cwd(),'.forge.json'),'utf-8')); const hook=cfg?.hooks?.postRun?.invokeAuditor; if(!hook)throw new Error('invokeAuditor block missing'); if(hook.onFailure!==true)throw new Error('expected onFailure=true'); if(hook.everyNRuns!==1)throw new Error('expected everyNRuns=1'); console.log('ok both conditions configured: onFailure=true everyNRuns=1');"

teardown.cmd: node -e "const fs=require('fs'),p=require('path'); const targets=[p.join(process.cwd(),'.forge.json'),p.join(process.cwd(),'.forge','auditor-state.json')]; for(const t of targets){try{fs.rmSync(t,{force:true});}catch{}} "
